title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: kmod-kvdo bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for kmod-kvdo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64

fixes.description: Latest kmod-kvdo does not work with the latest RHEL-9.7.0 kernel

full_text:
An update for kmod-kvdo is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
